## PrivaCI v0.1.0-beta.2

First GitHub release of the public engine (Elastic License 2.0).

### Highlights

- **In-VPC PostgreSQL masking** — stream a production replica into a safe staging
  database with referential integrity preserved.
- **Deterministic faking** — same input + salt always yields the same output
  across tables (no mapping DB).
- **Auto-detect PII** — zero-config column classification; optional strict mode
  for CI gates.
- **Crash-safe resume** — per-batch checkpoints in `_privaci` on the target.
- **Plugin contracts** — `privaci.contracts` v1.0 for optional commercial
  extensions (`privaci --contract-version`).

### Install

```bash
# Container (multi-arch amd64 + arm64)
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:0.1.0-beta.2
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:beta    # rolling beta head

# Helm (OCI)
helm install privaci oci://ghcr.io/boundarylogic/charts/privaci --version 0.1.0-beta.2

# Python (from source until PyPI trusted publishing is configured)
pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v0.1.0-beta.2"
```

### Notable changes since beta.1

- Batch sizing uses per-column `pg_stats.avg_width` (OOM guard for wide TEXT/JSONB).
- `emit_create_sequence` fix for dotted/quoted sequence identifiers.
- `privaci report --output` creates parent directories.
- Implicit commercial-contract CI guard + canonical catalog snapshot fixture.
- Portable TODO pre-commit hook; `mktemp`-based fixture verification.

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).

### Operator notes

- Commercial-tier contract version: **`1.0`**
- Config-pack trust anchor (`PRIVACI_PACK_PUBLIC_KEY`):
  `cd965cb6dadcecefd508ae84a000684f431490c3d3ddae006ad5f89bf2c25978`
- See [pack-signing runbook](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/docs/runbooks/pack-signing.md)
